title: Borealis Dataverse Collection
description: JSON Schema for a Dataverse (collection) object returned by the Borealis native REST API, as used by the Universite de Montreal collection. Derived from the Dataverse v6.8.1 OpenAPI Dataverse schema; only fields actually present in the spec are retained.

id.description: Internal numeric database identifier for the dataverse collection.

alias.description: Short URL-friendly alias for the collection (e.g. montreal).

name.description: Display name of the dataverse collection.

storageIdentifier.description: Backing storage identifier for the collection.

createDate.description: Date the collection record was created.

dtype.description: Internal discriminator type for the persisted DvObject.
